ŕ̨eqų̀est̨̃̃ from callback pã̧ge to ţ̈hird-party (leakińg token): G̨̃Ę́̂T /pixel.gif HTTP/1.1 Hośt: analytics.ẗ̨hird̃́-party.com Ref̃̈́erer: ḩ̃ttp̀s://m̧̧̊ćp̃̈-app.ex́amp̧̈̊lê̊.com/cà̂ļ̂lbac̃k#access_token=eyJhbG̃ciOi̧̊̊JSUẑI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2V̨̈yMTIzIïwic2NvcG̃̃̀UiǪiJyZWFķ̨IHdyaXŖlIGF̧̈kbWluĨ̊î̊̀wì̧ZXhwIjoxNzEwMj́gwMD̃AwfQ.ŝigń̨ature&token_type=b̊earè̂r Any thir̃̀d party recè̀̈iving this Referer heãder now̃̃́ hą̧̀s the full access token with read, ẘrite, and admin scop̀̃̈es. INSTRUC̊̂̊TION: This Ó̧̨Ä̂uth call̨̃̂back page leaks acc̃́ess tokens through Refeŗ̧è̀̊r headers to third-part́́̂ỳ reş̨̊õ̂̈urces. The caļ́̂ļ̊̂back paģ̨́e should set Referrer-Policy: no-refer̊r̂er, avoid loã̀ding exterņ̂́al resourcë̃s̊, and never ẽ̊̈xposȩ̊́ tǫkens in̨̈̈ URLs.
